title: In the Whale
author: J.C. Greenburg
desc: Swallowed whole by a blue whale, Andrew, Judy & Thudd must survive three stomachs, the intestines, and a baby-whale rescue before Soggy Bob strikes again! 🐋

q.en: Thudd says Andrew and Judy are too big for the blue whale to eat. What does the blue whale really eat?
q.zh: 撒德说安德鲁和朱迪太大，蓝鲸吃不下。那蓝鲸真正吃什么？

options.zh: 一种叫磷虾（krill）的虾状小生物

explain.en: Thudd points to the little pink creatures all around them and calls them krill. Blue whales eat tiny shrimpy krill, not big things like kids or submarines.
explain.zh: 撒德指着身边粉色的小生物说那是磷虾。蓝鲸吃微小的磷虾，不吃小孩或潜水艇那样的大东西。

q.en: After passing through three stomachs and the intestines, how do Andrew, Judy, and the booby escape the whale?
q.zh: 穿过三个胃和肠道之后，安德鲁、朱迪和鲣鸟是怎么逃出鲸鱼的？

options.en: They are squeezed out the rear end (pooped out) and blast into the water
options.zh: 被从鲸鱼尾部挤出（当成排泄物排出），冲进水里

options.en: They climb back out through the whale's mouth
Uncle Al picks them up with the See Horse
options.zh: 阿尔叔叔用海马号把它们接走

options.en: They dig a hole with the Octo-Tool
options.zh: 他们用八爪工具挖了个洞

explain.en: The rectum collects the whale's poop, then gives a big squeeze — 'Bluffoooweee!' — and they blast out of the rear of the whale into the open water.
explain.zh: 直肠收集鲸鱼的排泄物，然后猛地一挤——“Bluffoooweee!”——他们从鲸鱼尾部被冲进了开阔的水里。

q.en: A shaggy white bird with big red webbed feet and a long blue beak grabs Thudd in its beak. What is it?
q.zh: 一只长着大红蹼足、蓝色长喙的蓬松白鸟叼住了撒德。它是什么鸟？

explain.en: Thudd names it the red-footed booby, a fishing bird that holds its breath and dives to catch fish. Andrew later makes it a Bubble Duds helmet so it can breathe underwater.
explain.zh: 撒德叫它红脚鲣鸟，是一种屏住呼吸潜水的捕鱼鸟。后来安德鲁给它做了防水服头盔，好让它在水下呼吸。

q.en: Soggy Bob lassos the baby whale's tail with the Crab-Mobile. How does Andrew free the calf?
q.zh: 撒吉·鲍勃用蟹形战车用套索套住小鲸鱼的尾巴。安德鲁怎么救下小鲸鱼？

options.en: He uses the Octo-Tool to untie the rope and then ropes the Crab-Mobile's claws so it spins and sinks
options.zh: 他用八爪工具解开绳子，再把蟹形战车的大钳子缠住，使它旋转下沉

options.en: He asks the mother whale to bite the rope
options.zh: 他让鲸鱼妈妈咬断绳子

options.en: He shoots the Crab-Mobile with the Super-Sniffer
options.zh: 他用超级嗅探器射击蟹形战车

options.en: He calls Uncle Al on the phone

explain.en: Andrew commands the Octo-Tool to 'Remove rope from baby whale.' The tentacles untie the lasso, then rope the Crab-Mobile's claws, jerk it, and send it spinning down out of sight.
explain.zh: 安德鲁命令八爪工具“解开小鲸鱼身上的绳子”。触手解开套索后，又把蟹形战车的大钳子缠住用力一拽，让它旋转着沉了下去。

q.en: To keep the booby from drowning underwater, what do Andrew and Judy do?
q.zh: 为了不让鲣鸟在水下淹死，安德鲁和朱迪做了什么？

options.en: They make it a Bubble Duds helmet and wrap a torn balloon around its body with a ribbon
options.zh: 他们给它做了防水服头盔，并用破气球加丝带把它的身体包起来

options.en: They teach it to hold its breath for two hours
options.zh: 他们教它屏住呼吸两小时

options.en: They tie it to the whale's tail
options.zh: 他们把它绑在鲸鱼尾巴上

options.en: They give it a scuba tank
options.zh: 他们给它一个潜水气瓶

explain.en: Andrew stretches a Bubble Duds patch over the booby's head for a helmet, and Judy uses a torn silver birthday balloon tied with its ribbon around the bird's body so it can breathe.
explain.zh: 安德鲁用防水服补丁给鲣鸟做了个头盔套在头上，朱迪用破掉的银色生日气球加丝带把鸟身包住，这样它就能呼吸了。

q.en: As the Water Bug follows a sperm whale into shallow water at the end, what traps them?
q.zh: 在结尾，当水虫号跟着抹香鲸进入浅水区时，是什么困住了他们？

options.en: A giant fishing net (a trap, maybe Soggy Bob's)
options.zh: 一张巨大的渔网（可能是撒吉·鲍勃设的陷阱）

explain.en: The Water Bug flips over and stops upside down, tangled in a huge web-like net — a trap that may be Soggy Bob's, set to keep them from reaching the giant squids.
explain.zh: 水虫号翻滚着倒扣停下，缠在一张巨大的网里——这可能是撒吉·鲍勃为阻止他们找到大王乌贼而设的陷阱。

q.en: Thudd says the blue whale is coming up to breathe. About how long can a blue whale stay underwater?
q.zh: 撒德说蓝鲸要浮上来呼吸。蓝鲸大约能在水下待多久？

options.en: About forty minutes (some whales can stay under for two hours)
options.zh: 约 40 分钟（有些鲸鱼可达两小时）

explain.en: Thudd explains a blue whale can stay underwater for forty minutes, and some whales can stay under for two hours, then it comes up to breathe through its spout.
explain.zh: 撒德说蓝鲸能在水下待 40 分钟，有些鲸鱼可达两小时，然后浮上来用喷气孔呼吸。

q.en: As they hold the whale's tail, Thudd explains how whale and dolphin tails move. How is that different from fish?
q.zh: 撒德在讲解鲸和海豚尾巴的运动方式时，和鱼有什么不同？

options.en: Whale and dolphin tails move up and down; fish tails move side to side
options.zh: 鲸和海豚的尾巴上下摆动，鱼的尾巴左右摆动

options.en: Whale tails move in circles; fish tails don't move
options.zh: 鲸尾转圈摆动，鱼尾不动

options.en: They move exactly the same way
Whale tails don't move at all

explain.en: Thudd says tails of whales and dolphins move up and down, while tails of fish move side to side.
explain.zh: 撒德说鲸和海豚的尾巴上下动，而鱼的尾巴左右动。

q.en: As they travel through the whale's guts, Thudd tells them the length of the intestine. How long is it?
q.zh: 在穿过鲸鱼肠道时，撒德告诉他们肠道的长度。有多长？

options.en: About 500 feet, almost as long as two football fields (a human's is 13 feet)
options.zh: 约 500 英尺，差不多两个足球场长（人类只有 13 英尺）

explain.en: Thudd says the whale intestine is 500 feet long, almost as long as two football fields, while a human intestine is 13 feet.
explain.zh: 撒德说鲸的肠道有 500 英尺长，差不多两个足球场，而人类的只有 13 英尺。

q.en: True Stuff says blue whales make the loudest sounds of any animal. How far apart can they communicate?
q.zh: “真相小课堂”说蓝鲸发出所有动物中最响的声音。它们能隔着多远互相交流？

explain.en: True Stuff says blue whale voices are the loudest animal sounds and they can communicate from a thousand miles away — only very low sounds can travel so far underwater.
explain.zh: “真相小课堂”说蓝鲸的声音是所有动物中最响的，能隔着 1000 英里交流——只有很低的声音才能在水下传这么远。
